system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Arm Strike against Evade
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You touch a large stone or boulder with your finger, generating enough Qi to drive it toward your foe or smash it into pieces. On a Success you hurl a large piece of stone at your foe, which does 2d10 Damage. It has a range of 10 feet per Rank of Neigong. Cathartic: You can shatter an enormous stone or rock, hurling many chunks at your opponent. Works as normal except you can deliver one stone per Qi Level. The character must be in possession of a stone for this to work. If used to hurl at foes, the stone does 5d10 Damage.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: You can shatter an enormous stone or rock, hurling many chunks at your opponent. Works as normal except you can deliver one stone per Qi Level. The character must be in possession of a stone for this to work. If used to hurl at foes, the stone does 5d10 Damage.
